name: Sprouting Seeds with Carrot Salad & Cottage Cheese.
recipeIngredient: Half an ounce (15 g) Sultanas or raisins
Quarter of a box of mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the oil, poppy or sesame seeds, and vinegar in a bowl. Season with salt and pepper. Add the grated carrot and Sultanas or raisins, and toss well.
2. In another bowl, mix together mustard, cress, bean sprouts, alfalfa seeds, and chopped celery. Sprinkle with lemon juice and additional salt and pepper to taste.
3. Arrange the carrot salad and sprouting seed mixture on a serving plate. Add cottage cheese and garnish with celery leaves.
Preparation time: 10 minutes
Servings: 1
Calories per serving: 200
Macronutrients: 1 fat, 1 fruit, 2 protein, 2 vegetables
